content.en:
"Huh, Xiuwei has finally broken through to the middle stage of the Sevenfold Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian felt a little improved strength, and said secretly.

I have to say that it is simply too difficult to cultivate to reach the Sevenfold Dao Realm and continue to improve your strength!

He spent a lot of resources, if it weren't for the fact that he killed a large number of Supreme Void Demons and obtained a lot of resources and battle exploits, he really couldn't withstand such resource consumption.

Fortunately, he still broke through, and the next step was to raise his cultivation to the late stage of the sevenfold Dao realm.

As for the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, he still had no clue at all, and if he wanted to comprehend the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules by himself without the help of external objects, the years it would take were unimaginable.

However, on this day, the Su Domain Lord came to him.

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian met with the Lord of Su Domain.

"Lord Su Domain, what are you looking for me?"

Ye Tian asked straight to the point.

The Su Domain Lord smiled and said, "There is something to ask the Ye Domain Lord for help?"

"Looking for my help?" Ye Tian was surprised, "Su Domain Lord, you are from the Su Clan, there are countless strong people in the Su Clan, even your strength is above me, what can I do to help you?"

Su Yu Lord said: "Ye Domain Lord, this matter is really only you can help me, because the other Su Clan Dao Realm dare not take risks, but Ye Domain Lord, you dare to take risks, you have many doppelgangers, and the price of refining should not be too great, and you are taking the road of the strongest Dao, and you can fight beyond the level, so I can only ask you for help." "

Subsequently, under the narration of the Su Domain Lord, Ye Tian knew what the situation was.

It turned out that the Lord of the Su Domain had discovered a treasure land, this treasure land was very dangerous, and only allowed to enter the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and if the Eightfold Dao Realm entered, the strength would be suppressed dozens of times, and no Eightfold Dao Realm dared to enter.

And the Su Domain Lord was even more afraid to go in, but she found this treasure land and sent her own people to occupy the treasure land, so this treasure land was controlled by her.

But if she can't get in, she won't be able to get her hands on the resources and treasures inside.

"Ye Domain Lord, I will send a large number of Sevenfold Dao Realm to cooperate with you, and you can get thirty percent of the resources you find. Su Yu Lord said.

"Sancheng!"

Ye Tian also knew that this was a lot of resources, if it weren't for the Su Domain Lord, he wouldn't know where it was.

"Su Domain Lord, why do you have some resources, you don't know if there is anything good in that treasure land so urgently looking for me?" Ye Tian asked.

The Su Domain Lord nodded, "There is indeed a good thing, there is a high probability that that treasure land has a fourth sequence of supreme path rule items!"

"What !!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Are you sure?" Ye Tian said excitedly.

"Not 100% sure. The Su Domain Lord said truthfully: "I asked an ancestor in the clan to deduce it, and the result of the deduction is that there is such a treasure in that treasure land, but I am not sure if it is a perfect-level fourth-order supreme Dao rule item. "

"What is a Perfection-level Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item?" Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Su Domain took the Supreme Dao Strange Thing as an example: "The Supreme Dao Rule item obtained from the Supreme Dao Strange Thing is the Perfection-level Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Item, and there is no harm in refining such a Supreme Dao Rule item. And under the perfect quality, there are top quality, high quality, medium quality, low quality and inferior quality. For example, the Black Abyss Devouring Stone and the Purple Ruin Devouring Stone are second-grade Supreme Dao Rule items, and once they are refined, they will be wasted. At the very least, you need high-quality Supreme Dao Rule items, if you refine a small amount, it won't affect the future too much, and if you refine too much, you can't do it. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Immediately, he agreed: "Lord Su Domain, I agreed!"

Such a good thing, why didn't he agree.

If he really obtained the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, no matter what quality it was, he would dare to refine it, so as to comprehend the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule!

What is the probability of the fourth sequence of supreme dao rules, many ninefold supreme dao realms will never be able to comprehend.

Knowing that that treasure land had the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, how could the Su Domain Lord not be in a hurry?

But it must be very dangerous there, the Su Domain Lord must have sent the Sevenfold Dao Realm to enter before this, but the losses were too heavy, and no other Sevenfold Dao Realm was willing to enter.

The strength is not good, and no matter how much you go in, you will be sent to death.

As for the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm that walks the strongest to the Dao, the Su Domain Lord will definitely be able to afford it, but people don't dare to take risks!

......

Imaginary domain.

Broken Void River.

Ye Tian and the Su Domain Lord came here.

Ye Tian came to this area for the first time and didn't know anything about it.

The Lord of the Su Domain introduced Ye Tian: "This is the Broken Void River in the Void Domain. The Void Domain is very large, and the Innate Origin Domain Alliance and the Territory of the Supreme Dao Void Demon Life can only be regarded as a part of the Void Domain, and outside of this area, there are also scattered treasure lands, which take a long time, and there is hope to find them. And the Broken Void River is such a place, here resources are poor, but I unexpectedly found that a new treasure land was born here, so I occupied it early!"

"Won't the Supreme Dao Void Demon invade here?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the Su Domain Lord affirmed, "but they don't know about this place now, this place is far away from the Supreme Dao Void Demon Tribe, and it is unlikely that they will come here." That's why I'm in a hurry to occupy this place, then mine the resources in it, and find the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item. "

Soon.

They came to the entrance of the treasure land, which was a black rift, and on the other side of the rift was the treasure land.

And at the entrance of the rift, there is a sevenfold to the Dao realm here, and there are many eightfold to the Dao realm.

"Ye Domain Lord, these Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms are all going in with you!" said the Su Domain Lord.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

These Sevenfold Highest Dao Realms actually didn't help him much, but why did the Su Domain Lord still let these Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms go in with him, he naturally went to the Dao Realm.

Watch it all!

If he went in, found the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, and directly retreated and cultivated inside, using up these Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, wouldn't he have no share of the Su Domain Lord?

She also had this concern, so she let some of the Sevenfold Dao Realm enter.

Unless Ye Tian kills all the Sevenfold Dao Realm, it will be exposed.

But he would never dare to do that!

If it were him, he would do the same.

So, it's nothing to be angry about.

"You guys go in with the Ye Domain Lord!" ordered the Su Domain Lord.

"Yes!"

Many sevenfold to the realm of the Dao should be the Dao.

Immediately, Ye Tian took these Sevenfold Dao Realms through the rift and entered this treasure land.

After Ye Tian left, the Su Domain Lord muttered, "Ye Domain Lord, I hope you can find the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item!"

If she can find it, as long as it is above the high quality, she is expected to surpass the Nine Folds to the Dao Realm.
